goals: Initialize the access control system with basic configuration
Add the user's own contact as owner to grant full access
Simulate handling an incoming message from an unknown contact (stranger)
Process owner approval to elevate a contact from stranger to trusted tier

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and security-conscious. Prefers clear boundaries between trusted contacts and strangers. Values privacy and controlled access to AI tools.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands basic concept of access control and permissions but does not know the specific tool names or internal API details. Expects the assistant to handle security automatically.

end_condition: The user has successfully initialized the access control system, configured themselves as owner, and tested the stranger handling and approval workflow to ensure the system functions correctly.
